name: Fire Worker Ant
description: A highly aggressive tier 3 worker ant that dominates the fire anthill and large parts of the upper yard. It is the colony's gatherer, but unlike other workers it attacks the player on sight.

advancedLootTable.notes: Only from ants inside the anthill

specialTraits: Its acid spit counts as burning-type damage and temporarily lowers the target's defense/resistance. It also steals food from roasting spits, chests, and dropped backpacks.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It lunges in with a short, quick bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it head-on or sidestep late.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It pulls its head back slightly before a longer lunge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge sideways; straight backpedaling is riskier.
attacks.notes: Hits harder than the normal bite and reaches farther.

attacks.name: Acid Spit
attacks.tell: It pauses and spits an acid glob much like a termite worker.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move sideways and do not stand where it lands.
attacks.notes: Deals burning-type damage and leaves a temporary resistance debuff.

behavior: It moves quickly across the ground while searching for food or small prey for the colony. It often carries items back into the anthill and crowds around large food sources to harvest them.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight and can steal food from player structures. If attacked near the colony, it often runs back to the anthill and pulls nearby soldiers into the fight.
interactionWithCreatures: It hunts weevils like other ants and coexists peacefully with fire workers and soldiers. Around most other creatures it stays neutral until something attacks it.
strategy: A Mint Mace or any strong fresh setup melts it quickly. If there are several, prioritize clearing acid space and avoid fighting near food piles or the anthill entrance, where reinforcements arrive easily.
